jcr:content.jcr:title: 5 ways AbbVie is working to deliver medicines in half the time
jcr:content.cardDescription: How can we get novel drugs to the market more quickly? From rapid proof of concept to accelerated clinical development, see how AbbVie is challenging drug development timelines.

jcr:content.jcr:title: Digital Science Lab
jcr:content.cardDescription: Scientist Michelle Crouthamel describes how her lab integrates biosensors and wearables to bring clearer insights about medicine we’re developing.
